description: Undeath, decay, entropy, corruption, and suffering as currency.
traits: Necrotic Garden
It tends a garden where dead things grow. Undead fungi and withered vines spread outward, a twisted mockery of nature fed by rot and sustained by decay.
Entropy Accelerator
Time's decay moves faster near it. Food rots in the hand, metal rusts mid-swing, wounds fester in moments. A trail of aged ruin marks its passage.
Rust Prophet
Weapons crumble and buildings sag in its wake. It preaches the return of all things to dust, and civilization withers wherever it lingers.
Ruin Singer
Its song unravels everything. Structures crack, bonds dissolve, hope gutters and dies. Cities empty when its melody drifts over the walls.
Sin Eater
It devours the evil in others, granting them peace while absorbing their darkness. Each sin consumed makes it stronger and more monstrous.
Hope Plague
It spreads infectious, false optimism. The afflicted ignore every danger, blind to ruin, smiling through catastrophe. Victims die with joy on their faces.
Atrocity Echo
It manifests at places where terrible things happened, forcing witnesses to experience the horror again. An accidental memorial that ensures evil is never forgotten.
Suffering Economist
Pain is its currency. It brokers agony between willing and unwilling parties, maintains exchange rates of misery, and offers suffering on credit.
War Memory
A forgotten conflict given form. It forces old battles to replay around it, summoning echoes of dead soldiers to finish a war no one else remembers.
Burden Bearer
It absorbs curses, diseases, and afflictions from others, growing heavier with each burden it accepts. A walking collection of ailments, it offers relief for a price.
Living Prison
Its interior is a vast jail dimension. It swallows the guilty and innocent alike, and a small society of prisoners has formed inside its belly.
Tragedy Composer
It orchestrates suffering like a symphony, positioning people for maximum dramatic impact. It sees every life as an act in a grand, terrible play.
Living Taboo
Its existence breaks fundamental rules. Looking at it, speaking of it, even knowing about it brings ruin. Whole societies pretend it is not there.
